description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a predominantly matte black finish accented by metallic gold highlights on various mechanical components. The body is angular and modern, with a prominent rail system running along the top for mounting accessories. The stock is adjustable and features a contoured cheek rest, while the grip is ergonomic and textured for secure handling. The barrel is enclosed within a thick shroud, and the lower section appears to house a tubular magazine. Visible details include a trigger guard with a squared, reinforced profile and a pump-action fore-end with a ribbed grip. The overall construction suggests a high-performance, urban tactical shotgun built for reliability and modularity.
description: A modern, tactical black shotgun with gold accents, featuring a rail system, adjustable stock, and pump-action fore-end. Its angular design and robust build make it suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: The shotgun is viewed directly from the muzzle end, showing a narrow profile with the barrel and shroud aligned vertically.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the rail system, gold-accented components, ergonomic grip, and adjustable stock.
description_view_2: The shotgun is seen from the rear, displaying the stock and grip alignment, as well as the back of the receiver and cheek rest.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the pump-action fore-end, trigger guard, and detailed mechanical features.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a thick shroud and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, reinforced trigger guard with a robust, angular profile
